name: Italian-Style Vegetables with Pasta (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 1 red pepper, seeded and coarsely chopped
1 green pepper, seeded and coarsely chopped
1 yellow pepper, seeded and coarsely chopped
2 small zucchini, cut into 1/2 inch slices
14 ounces Tomatoes, whole, peeled in sauce
4 large tomatoes, sun-dried, softened and chopped
2 tablespoons Fresh oregano, chopped or 1/2 teaspoon Dried oregano
2 tablespoons Fresh basil, chopped or 1/2 teaspoon Dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet.
2. Add the vegetable stock and all ingredients except the pasta.
3. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 15 to 20 minutes, or until al dente.
4. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
5. Drain well and serve with the vegetable sauce.
6. Makes 4 servings. One serving is equal to 1 cup pasta and 1 cup sauce.
